query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_contacts, COUNT(CASE WHEN leadSource = 'facebook' THEN 1 END) as facebook_contacts, COUNT(CASE WHEN leadSource = 'Facebook' THEN 1 END) as facebook_cap_contacts FROM contacts WHERE accountId = 420001;
